# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

- 200
              request_method:
                - GET
              content_type:
                - application/json
              cache_ttl: 60
              strategy: memory
              memory:
                dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

      # Admin user management route
      - name: admin-user-management-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-level: Even stricter rate limiting for user management
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 15
              hour: 200
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "Admin user management rate limit exceeded."

          # Route-level: Request size limiting
          - name: request-size-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 2
              size_unit: megabytes
              require_content_length: true

          # Route-level: ACL override - only super-admin can manage users
          - name: acl
            enabled: true
            config:
              allow:
                - super-admin
              hide_groups_header: true

      # Admin system configuration route
      - name: admin-system-config-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/config
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-level: Most restrictive rate limiting
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 5
              hour: 50
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "System configuration rate limit exceeded."

          # Route-level: ACL - only super-admin
          - name: acl
            enabled: true
            config:
              allow:
                - super-admin
              hide_groups_header: true

          # Route-level: Request logging for audit trail
          - name: http-log
            enabled: true
            config:
              http_endpoint: http://audit-log-service.internal:9000/logs
              method: POST
              content_type: application/json
              timeout: 10000
              keepalive: 60000
              flush_timeout: 2
              retry_count: 3
              headers:
                X-Log-Source: kong-admin-config

  # Public API Service - webhook and public endpoints
  - name: public-api-service
    url: http://public-api.internal:8004
    protocol: http
    port: 8004
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    plugins:
      # Service-level: Basic auth for public API consumers
      - name: basic-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          hide_credentials: true

      # Service-level: Permissive CORS for public API
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-API-Key
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-ID
            - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
          credentials: false
          max_age: 7200
          preflight_continue: false

      # Service-level: Rate limiting for public API
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 60
          hour: 1000
          day: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          error_code: 429
          error_message: "Public API rate limit exceeded. Please check your plan limits."

    routes:
      # Public health check - no auth required
      - name: public-health-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/health
          - /api/v1/status
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
          - http
        plugins:
          # Route-level: Disable all auth for health checks
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: false

          - name: basic-auth
            enabled: false

          # Route-level: Minimal rate limiting for health checks
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 300
              hour: 10000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true

      # Webhook receiver route
      - name: webhook-receiver-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/webhooks
        methods:
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        plugins:
          # Route-level: Disable basic auth for webhooks (uses signature verification)
          - name: basic-auth
            enabled: false

          # Route-level: Disable key-auth for webhooks
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: false

          # Route-level: CORS for webhook origins
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://stripe.com"
                - "https://api.stripe.com"
                - "https://github.com"
                - "https://api.github.com"
                - "https://hooks.slack.com"
              methods:
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Content-Type
                - X-Hub-Signature
                - X-Hub-Signature-256
                - Stripe-Signature
                - X-Slack-Signature
                - X-Slack-Request-Timestamp
              credentials: false
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          # Route-level: Rate limiting for webhooks
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 5000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              error_code: 429
              error_message: "Webhook rate limit exceeded."

          # Route-level: Request size limiting for webhooks
          - name: request-size-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              allowed_payload_size: 10
              size_unit: megabytes
              require_content_length: false

          # Route-level: IP restriction for known webhook sources
          - name: ip-restriction
            enabled: true
            config:
              allow:
                # Stripe webhook IPs
                - 3.18.12.63/32
                - 3.130.192.231/32
                - 13.235.14.237/32
                - 13.235.122.149/32
                # GitHub webhook IPs
                - 140.82.112.0/20
                - 185.199.108.0/22
                - 192.30.252.0/22
                # Internal
                - 10.0.0.0/8
              status: 403
              message: "Webhook source IP not allowed."

# Consumers for authentication
consumers:
  - username: webapp-consumer
    custom_id: webapp-001
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 8000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true

  - username: mobile-app-consumer
    custom_id: mobile-001
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 150
          hour: 6000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true

  - username: admin-consumer
    custom_id: admin-001
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 1000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true

  - username: third-party-partner
    custom_id: partner-001
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 30
          hour: 500
          day: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true

# Upstream configurations for load balancing
upstreams:
  - name: user-service.internal
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 302
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 503
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 5
          http_statuses:
            - 200
            - 201
            - 202
            - 204
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 502
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "10.0.1.10:8001"
        weight: 100
      - target: "10.0.1.11:8001"
        weight: 100

  - name: order-service.internal
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 429
            - 500
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "10.0.2.10:8002"
        weight: 100
      - target: "10.0.2.11:8002"
        weight: 100
      - target: "10.0.2.12:8002"
        weight: 100

  - name: admin-service.internal
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 15
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 2
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "10.0.3.10:8003"
        weight: 100

  - name: public-api.internal
    algorithm: round-robin
    hash_on: none
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 200
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          http_statuses:
            - 500
            - 503
    targets:
      - target: "10.0.4.10:8004"
        weight: 100
      - target: "10.0.4.11:8004"
        weight: 100
